events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a panelboard installation that is in-progress. Pre-task photos show guards, access control, and crew protection in place. Daily briefing form is signed. No active exposure visible. Reference materials on hand: NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4.

This seems like a well-planned, safe setup with no hazards visible. The work is in-progress but the safety controls are in place. No defects or hazards are described. This looks like a pass situation with low risk.
